subcodes.first_line: O thou oppressed one in the Path of God! Thy detailed letter was carefully perused despite the lack of time. 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظلوم سبیل الهی نامه مفصل شما با وجود عدم فرصت بدقت ملاحظه گردید عبدالبهاء در
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
